name: record
description: Adapter skills for the Homebrew-installed record CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Capture apps and transcribe local media.
interface.longDescription: Record exposes capture and transcribe skills for the Homebrew-installed record CLI. It helps agents start and stop native ScreenCaptureKit Mac app recordings and transcribe local media with whisper.cpp while keeping recordings, transcripts, metadata, and setup state on the user's machine.
defaultPrompt: Use $capture to record a visible Mac app.
Use $transcribe to transcribe a local media file.
